chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-3036 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 16-04-2025 Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G, Sindh.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After having gone through the report submitted by Additional Registrar of this Court, learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
